{{Quote|I know of a guy that is probably doing some undercover work here. I'll bet he could use somebody who's trained to be a Spy. Talk to Lercer in the Cantina.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:YNW">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|You Need Work|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
'''Lercer Gaia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] who was living during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Although a frontal assault is never preferred in our line of work, sometimes it's unavoidable.|Lercer Gaia, to a spy|<ref name="SWG:Ftp">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Spy|Finishing the plot|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
A Bothan spy, Lercer Gaia resided on board [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]], after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="SWG:LtS" /> Beyond Tansarii Point Station, Lercer was part of a larger spy network involving [[Kaesii DuPree]] and [[Sarlis Beni]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="SWG:SLU">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Spy|Spies Like Us|Tatooine}}</ref><ref name="SWG:CE">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Spy|Corporate Espionage|Tatooine}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Lercer Gaia undertook the training of a spacer who wished to become a spy and had just arrived on Tansarii Point Station with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="SWG:LtS" /> During that time, Gaia was interested in finding information about the war raging between the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] controlling Tansarii Point Station and the [[Rak'qua]] living in neighboring [[Station Gamma]]. For a first mission, Lercer tasked his spy trainee to [[Slicer/Legends|slice]] the high security files from the Systems Data Control terminal of Tansarii Point Station. The spacer succeeded and found information that a local arms dealer had bribed people on both stations in an attempt to start a conflict and sell more weapons.<ref name="SWG:TSG">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Spy|The Spy's Game|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref> Gaia later dispatched the spy to Station Gamma in order to find more evidences. The spacer therefore infiltrated the Rak'qua space station and was able to find data corroborating the information.<ref name="SWG:Ftp" /> The Bothan spy eventually sold the information to [[Officer/Legends|Officer]] [[Antom Moria]] who used it to prevent escalation of the conflict.<ref name="SWG:PaW">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Officer|Preventing a War|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

After those events, the spacer left Tansarii Point Station and traveled to Tatooine. There, Lercer Gaia introduced the spacer to the spies Kaesii DuPree and Sarlis Beni. The spacer later achieved several missions for both of them.<ref name="SWG:SLU" /><ref name="SWG:CE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lercer Gaia appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:LtS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Lercer Gaia was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
